reasoning: Your 25W power drop over 5 to 20 min highlights lactate clearance issues. Tackling this with over-unders enhances your aerobic base and fatigue resistance. The last ride shows your aerobic foundation is stable at low intensity, now let's prepare for the Alpine Loop's sustained climbs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (5 min at 242-256W, 5 min at 201-218W) with 5 min recovery at 209-223W

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
